creator: rnordier@nordier.com
text:
cmascott@world.std.com wrote:
> 
> >Number:         7758
> >Category:       misc
> >Synopsis:       fdimage.exe fails on some machines
[ ... ]
> > fdimage -v boot.flp a:
> 
> Formatting: cyl 79  hd 1
> Writing: cyl 0  hd 0
> Sector not found
 
To date, this problem has been seen only with the original version of
fdimage (which should be long gone, but periodically seems to rise
from the grave).

Please try

    fdimage -d -v boot.flp a:

and send along the debug output.  If "-d" isn't accepted, you need to
upgrade.

-- 
Robert Nordier
